title: Comparison Counting Sort Algorithm Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of the Comparison Counting Sort algorithm, showing how it counts the number of elements smaller than each item to determine its final sorted position.
relationships: Input array initializes the process and provides values for comparison
Count array is built by comparing each element against all others
Nested loops perform comparisons and increment count values
Final count values determine positions in the sorted output array
